steps.title: Identify the linear structure
steps.content:
The equation follows starting length plus growth equals final length:
$$
0.5t+6=10
$$
The constant $6$ is the starting length, and the expression $0.5t$ is the amount of growth after $t$ months.

steps.title: Interpret the units
steps.content: Since $t$ is measured in months and $0.5t$ is inches of growth, $0.5$ means inches per month. So the coefficient tells how much Mia's hair grows each month. The answer is B.
